# Model: haiku
# Duration: 17.3s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Jennifer! Welcome to Shiftsmart. I'm your personal concierge here to help you get started! Your first step is to complete your orientation in the app and you get paid $10 when you finish it! Reply HELP if you have any questions
Partner: 👍 to "Hi Jennifer! Welcome to Shiftsmart. I'm your personal concierge here to help you get started! Your first step is to complete your orientation in the app and you get paid $10 when you finish it! Reply HELP if you have any questions"
Concierge: You got it!
Partner: Removed ‌👍‌ from "Don't forget! - confirm your shift starting in 24 hours: 5/4/2026, 12:30 PM Circle K - Premium shift @ 15617 McMullen HWY SW, Cumberland, MD 21502 US"

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
